name: Germany (1933–1935)

colors.symbolism: from the colours of Prussia and the Hanseatic League
from the red-and-white of the Hanseatic League

description: A horizontal tricolour of black, white, and red in equal bands.
history: After the Nazi seizure of power, a ruling of 12 March 1933 banned the black-red-gold flag of the Weimar Republic and reinstated the old imperial black-white-red tricolour as one of two national flags, flown alongside the Nazi Party flag. This arrangement ended on 15 September 1935, when the swastika flag became the sole national flag.
